items.title: The CVE flood
items.body: 28,638 CVEs were published in 2026. Total has passed 361,499 and keeps growing.

items.title: Critical ≠ exploited
items.body: Only 4.34% of Critical CVEs are actually exploited. CVSS severity is not an indicator of what attackers use.

items.title: Score disagreement
items.body: 19% of CVEs scored by both NVD and CNA have different base scores. Same vulnerability, different numbers.

items.title: Overrepresented scores
items.body: CVSS 9.8 appears far more often than the calculator would predict (24200:1 ratio). Researchers and hackers have strong preferences.

items.title: Rejected CVEs
items.body: Duplicates, errors, and non-vulnerabilities that slipped through. Quality control is straining.

items.title: Publication delay
items.body: Median time from discovery to CVE publication. The gap leaves flaws known but untracked.
